name: Package Manager (corepack)
description: Installs and configures a Node.js package manager (pnpm, yarn, or npm) via corepack. Supports auto-detection from workspace package.json.

packageManager.description: Either 'auto' (read from workspace package.json) or a corepack spec like 'pnpm@10.33.2' or 'pnpm@10.33.2+sha512.<hash>'. Supported PMs: pnpm, yarn, npm.

github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: This dev container has a Node.js package manager configured via corepack. The package manager (pnpm, yarn, or npm) specified in the workspace `package.json` `packageManager` field is automatically activated. When no `packageManager` is specified, corepack shims are enabled. Always use the configured package manager instead of calling `npm` directly.
